test/billing.purpose: Integration test suite for the billing domain — exercises invoice lifecycle, adapter persistence, collection flows, discounts, tax handling, schema migrations, and subscription sync against a real PostgreSQL database provisioned via pgtestdb and Atlas migrations.

patterns.name: BaseSuite embedding
patterns.description: Every test suite embeds BaseSuite (suite.go) which boots the full billing stack from raw package constructors — never from app/common. All shared service fields are initialised in BaseSuite.setupSuite.
patterns.example:
type InvoicingTestSuite struct { BaseSuite }
func TestInvoicing(t *testing.T) { suite.Run(t, new(InvoicingTestSuite)) }

patterns.name: SubscriptionMixin for subscription-dependent tests
patterns.description: Suites requiring plan/subscription/addon/entitlement/credit services embed SubscriptionMixin alongside BaseSuite and call SubscriptionMixin.SetupSuite(t, s.GetSubscriptionMixInDependencies()) in their SetupSuite override.
patterns.example: type SubscriptionTestSuite struct { BaseSuite; SubscriptionMixin; SubscriptionSyncService subscriptionsync.Service }

patterns.name: Unique namespace per test
patterns.description: Every test method uses a unique namespace string ('ns-' prefixed constant unique per method, or s.GetUniqueNamespace(prefix)) to prevent cross-test FK violations on the shared database.

patterns.name: clock.SetTime / clock.ResetTime for deterministic time
patterns.description: Time-dependent tests freeze or advance pkg/clock globally. BaseSuite.TearDownTest always calls clock.UnFreeze() and clock.ResetTime(); inline clock.SetTime still needs a defer clock.ResetTime().

patterns.name: MockStreamingConnector for usage events
patterns.description: Usage events are injected via s.MockStreamingConnector.AddSimpleEvent(meterSlug, quantity, ts). Always defer s.MockStreamingConnector.Reset() to prevent bleed into subsequent sub-tests.

patterns.name: Atlas migrations by default; TEST_DISABLE_ATLAS skips them
patterns.description: setupSuite runs full golang-migrate Atlas migrations unless TEST_DISABLE_ATLAS is set. SchemaMigrationTestSuite forces Atlas via SetupSuiteOptions{ForceAtlas: true}.

patterns.name: t.Context() preferred in new test code
patterns.description: New tests use ctx := s.T().Context() to tie context lifetime to the harness. Legacy tests still use context.Background() — keep consistency within each file.

key_file_guides.role: BaseSuite definition: wires billing, customer, feature, meter, app, taxcode, subject, sandbox, and custom-invoicing services from raw constructors. Provides InstallSandboxApp, CreateTestCustomer, ProvisionBillingProfile, CreateDraftInvoice, DebugDumpInvoice.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never import app/common — test-only import cycles. All cross-domain hooks must be registered here, not in individual test suites.

key_file_guides.role: SubscriptionMixin: builds plan/subscription/addon/entitlement/credit dependency graph from raw adapters. Exposes SetupEntitlements for the full credit/entitlement connector stack.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Requires SubscriptionMixInDependencies.Validate() to pass — all six fields non-nil. Uses eventbus.NewMock(t), not a real Kafka publisher.

key_file_guides.role: Tests schema-level migration paths. Uses s.BillingAdapter.SetInvoiceDefaultSchemaLevel and raw Ent queries to force legacy schema state, then validates migration read behaviour.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not use BillingService for setup here — the test must place rows that BillingService would normally reject.

key_file_guides.role: End-to-end tests for progressive billing collection: collection_at calculation, late-event windows, anchored alignment, flat-fee-only skipping collection.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Relies on clock.SetTime and MockStreamingConnector events at specific StoredAt timestamps — event order and time advancement must match invoice state machine transitions.

key_file_guides.role: Tests discount correlation ID stability across invoice splits and unit-discount progressive billing across multiple invoice periods.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Calls s.MeterAdapter.ReplaceMeters and defers cleanup — meters must be replaced before features are created and cleaned up in defer to avoid pollution.

key_file_guides.role: Shared profile fixture builder: minimalCreateProfileInputTemplate(appID) returns a default CreateProfileInput with AutoAdvance=true, DraftPeriod=P1D, CollectionInterval=PT0S.
key_file_guides.watch_for: CollectionInterval is PT0S (immediate) by default so general tests do not block on collection windows — collection-timing tests must override this.

anti_patterns: Importing app/common in test files — causes import cycles; construct services from raw adapters as BaseSuite does.
Using context.Background() when s.T().Context() is available.
Calling s.MockStreamingConnector.AddSimpleEvent without defer Reset() — events bleed into subsequent sub-tests.
Hard-coding the same namespace constant across multiple test methods in a file — causes FK constraint violations.
Accessing BillingAdapter directly when BillingService covers the same operation — bypasses state machine and validation logic.

decisions.decision: Construct all services from raw package constructors, not app/common Wire providers.
decisions.rationale: Avoids import cycles (app/common depends on openmeter packages; test/ packages are peers) and lets each suite compose only the services it needs.

decisions.decision: Run Atlas migrations by default (not ent.Schema.Create) in BaseSuite.
decisions.rationale: Ensures tests exercise the same migration path as production, catching column/constraint drift that ent.Schema.Create would silently fix.

decisions.decision: Use pkg/clock globally for deterministic time in tests.
decisions.rationale: Invoice lifecycle depends on clock.Now() for collection_at, quantity_snapshoted_at, and invoice_at comparisons; freezing clock eliminates race conditions.

code_examples.scenario: Typical test: install sandbox app, provision profile, create customer, inject events, advance clock, invoice pending lines
code_examples.code:
namespace := "ns-my-feature"
ctx := s.T().Context()
sandboxApp := s.InstallSandboxApp(s.T(), namespace)
s.ProvisionBillingProfile(ctx, namespace, sandboxApp.GetID(), WithProgressiveBilling())
cust := s.CreateTestCustomer(namespace, "test-subject")
s.MockStreamingConnector.AddSimpleEvent(meterSlug, 10, periodStart.Add(time.Minute))
defer s.MockStreamingConnector.Reset()
clock.SetTime(periodEnd.Add(time.Hour))
defer clock.ResetTime()
invoices, err := s.BillingService.InvoicePendingLines(ctx, billing.InvoicePendingLinesInput{Customer: cust.GetID()})
s.NoError(err)

test/credits.purpose: Integration tests for the credits/charges domain: credit grant lifecycle (invoice-funded, promotional, external), flat-fee/usage-based/credit-purchase charge advancement against a real ledger stack, and billing/charges rating logic. Extends test/billing.BaseSuite with ledger and charges service wiring.

patterns.name: Extend BaseSuite with ledger + charges stack
patterns.description: CreditsTestSuite embeds billingtest.BaseSuite and adds Charges, Ledger, LedgerAccountService, LedgerResolver, RevenueRecognizer. SetupSuite calls s.BaseSuite.SetupSuite() first, then ledgertestutils.InitDeps, then chargestestutils.NewServices.
patterns.example: type BaseSuite struct { billingtest.BaseSuite; Charges charges.Service; Ledger ledger.Ledger; LedgerResolver *ledgerresolvers.AccountResolver }

patterns.name: CreateLedgerBackedCustomer for ledger-dependent tests
patterns.description: Tests requiring a customer with ledger accounts (FBO, receivable) call s.CreateLedgerBackedCustomer(ns, subjectKey) which calls LedgerResolver.EnsureBusinessAccounts then CreateCustomerAccounts.

patterns.name: chargestestutils.NewServices for charge stack construction
patterns.description: The charges stack (usagebased, flatfee, creditpurchase handlers wired to ledgerchargeadapter) is always assembled via chargestestutils.NewServices, not ad-hoc inline.
patterns.example: stack, err := chargestestutils.NewServices(s.T(), chargestestutils.Config{Client: s.DBClient, BillingService: s.BillingService, FlatFeeHandler: ledgerchargeadapter.NewFlatFeeHandler(...)})

patterns.name: Drive charge lifecycle via charges.Service, not adapters
patterns.description: Tests call s.Charges.Create / AdvanceCharges / ApplyPatches rather than lower-level adapters, mirroring the billing-worker. CreateMockChargeIntent builds ChargeIntent values without struct literals.
patterns.example:
intent := s.CreateMockChargeIntent(CreateMockChargeIntentInput{Customer: cust.GetID(), Price: flatPrice})
grants, err := s.Charges.Create(ctx, charges.CreateInput{Namespace: ns, Intents: charges.ChargeIntents{intent}})

patterns.name: TearDownTest resets clock and streaming connector
patterns.description: BaseSuite.TearDownTest calls s.MockStreamingConnector.Reset(), clock.UnFreeze(), clock.ResetTime() automatically. Inline clock.SetTime after starting sub-tests still needs a defer clock.ResetTime().

key_file_guides.role: BaseSuite for credits: embeds billingtest.BaseSuite, initialises ledger deps via ledgertestutils.InitDeps, builds revenue recognizer, collector service, and the charges stack via chargestestutils.NewServices. Exposes CreateLedgerBackedCustomer and CreateMockChargeIntent.
key_file_guides.watch_for: SetupSuite order is critical: billingtest.BaseSuite.SetupSuite() must run before ledgertestutils.InitDeps so DBClient is available.

key_file_guides.role: Core charges lifecycle tests: AdvanceCharges, ApplyPatches, external payment settlement transitions for flatfee, usagebased, creditpurchase types.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Custom-invoicing app used (not sandbox) to verify async sync flows. Relies on clock.SetTime to control advancement windows.

key_file_guides.role: Tests creditgrant.Service.Create for invoice-funded, promotional, and external settlement grants and their invoice/state outcomes.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must use s.CreateLedgerBackedCustomer — plain CreateTestCustomer customers lack ledger accounts and cause resolver errors.

key_file_guides.role: Pure unit tests for the charges billing calculator: period resolution and billing period splitting without DB. RatingTestSuite does not embed BaseSuite.
key_file_guides.watch_for: These tests are fast and DB-independent — do not pull in BaseSuite setup overhead.

anti_patterns: Calling lower-level charge adapter methods directly instead of going through charges.Service.Create / AdvanceCharges / ApplyPatches.
Using BaseSuite.CreateTestCustomer for tests that require ledger accounts — use s.CreateLedgerBackedCustomer.
Constructing charges.ChargeIntent{} struct literals instead of charges.NewChargeIntent(flatfee.Intent{...}) — private discriminator stays zero-valued.
Instantiating ledger adapters inline in test methods — always delegate to ledgertestutils.InitDeps.
Using context.Background() instead of s.T().Context() in new tests.

decisions.decision: Wire ledger and charges stack on top of existing billingtest.BaseSuite rather than a separate test environment.
decisions.rationale: Reuses the billing, customer, feature, and streaming infrastructure already initialised in BaseSuite (~150-line setup), avoiding duplication and co-locating charge tests with billing tests.

decisions.decision: Use chargestestutils.NewServices as the canonical charges stack builder in tests.
decisions.rationale: Mirrors production wiring in app/common/charges.go, ensuring tests exercise the same handler-to-ledger-adapter wiring as production.

code_examples.scenario: Create a ledger-backed customer, build a flatfee charge intent, advance charges, assert FBO balance
code_examples.code:
cust := s.CreateLedgerBackedCustomer(ns, "test-subject")
intent := s.CreateMockChargeIntent(CreateMockChargeIntentInput{
	Customer: cust.GetID(), Currency: USD,
	Price: productcatalog.NewPriceFrom(productcatalog.FlatPrice{Amount: alpacadecimal.NewFromFloat(100)}),
	ServicePeriod: period,
})
grants, err := s.Charges.Create(ctx, charges.CreateInput{Namespace: ns, Intents: charges.ChargeIntents{intent}})
s.NoError(err)
clock.SetTime(period.To.Add(time.Hour))
_, err = s.Charges.AdvanceCharges(ctx, charges.AdvanceChargesInput{Namespace: ns})
s.NoError(err)
balance := s.MustCustomerFBOBalance(cust.GetID(), USD, mo.None[*alpacadecimal.Decimal]())
s.Equal(alpacadecimal.NewFromFloat(100), balance)

test/customer.purpose: Integration tests for customer, subject, subscription, entitlement, plan, and billing domains wired together — validates cross-domain lifecycle correctness (usage attributions, subject hooks, subscription constraints, invoice generation) against real PostgreSQL.

patterns.name: TestEnv interface with all cross-domain services
patterns.description: TestEnv exposes Customer(), Subscription(), SubscriptionWorkflow(), Entitlement(), Feature(), Subject(), Plan(), Billing(), App(), Meter() so test methods exercise multi-domain flows without constructing services inline.
patterns.example: type TestEnv interface { Customer() customer.Service; Subject() subject.Service; SubscriptionWorkflow() subscriptionworkflow.Service; Billing() billing.Service }

patterns.name: Hooks registered after service construction in NewTestEnv
patterns.description: After building customerService and subjectService from raw constructors, cross-domain hooks are wired manually: RegisterRequestValidator(entValidator), subjectService.RegisterHooks(subjectCustomerHook), customerService.RegisterHooks(customerSubjectHook), RegisterRequestValidator(subsCustValidator). Order matters.

patterns.name: subscriptiontestutils.SetupDBDeps for DB bootstrapping
patterns.description: NewTestEnv calls subscriptiontestutils.SetupDBDeps(t) instead of testutils.InitPostgresDB directly — handles schema migration and returns a DBClient ready for all adapters in one call.

patterns.name: Unique ULID namespace per test method via setupNamespace
patterns.description: Every test method in CustomerHandlerTestSuite begins with s.setupNamespace(t), assigning a new ulid.Make().String() to s.namespace for full isolation on the shared database.

patterns.name: clock.SetTime + t.Cleanup(clock.ResetTime) for time-sensitive tests
patterns.description: Tests that advance time call clock.SetTime(future) and always register t.Cleanup(clock.ResetTime) to prevent global clock state leaking between tests.

key_file_guides.role: Constructs the full multi-domain service graph from raw constructors. Wires meter, customer, entitlement, subject, plan, app, subscription, workflow, billing. Registers all hooks post-construction. Exposes TestEnv interface.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Hook registration order matters: entValidator before subjectHook before subscriptionValidator. Never import app/common. noopCustomerOverrideService is an inline noop — do not replace with a real impl.

key_file_guides.role: CustomerHandlerTestSuite with CRUD tests for customer lifecycle, key conflict detection, and subscription-present update constraints.
key_file_guides.watch_for: UsageAttribution is nil (not empty slice) when no subjects attached — assert Nil not Empty. TestKey is reused across methods only because setupNamespace provides isolation.

key_file_guides.role: Tests subject deletion edge cases (dangling subjects, attached subjects, subjects with active entitlements) and TestMultiSubjectIntegrationFlow — a full plan+subscription+invoice end-to-end.
key_file_guides.watch_for: TestMultiSubjectIntegrationFlow installs a sandbox app and creates a billing profile — both must succeed or the test panics. clock.ResetTime must be deferred immediately after clock.SetTime.

key_file_guides.role: Entry point: creates TestEnv, defers Close(), runs Customer and Subject sub-test groups via CustomerHandlerTestSuite and SubjectHandlerTestSuite.
key_file_guides.watch_for: t.Errorf used for Close errors (not t.Fatal) to ensure deferred Close always runs even if sub-tests fail.

anti_patterns: Importing app/common or Wire provider sets — all wiring must use raw package constructors to avoid import cycles.
Using context.Background() in new test code where t.Context() is available.
Reusing the same subject key or customer key across test functions without setupNamespace — causes unique-constraint violations.
Forgetting to defer clock.ResetTime() after clock.SetTime() — leaves global clock dirty for subsequent tests.
Asserting UsageAttribution as empty slice instead of nil — service returns nil when there are no subject keys.

decisions.decision: TestEnv exposes all cross-domain services (10 methods) rather than just customer.
decisions.rationale: Subject deletion, subscription constraints, and multi-subject billing flows require real subscription, entitlement, billing, and plan instances — a minimal customer-only env cannot exercise these.

decisions.decision: Hooks wired manually in NewTestEnv rather than discovered via DI.
decisions.rationale: Tests stay independent from app/common; manual registration ensures the hook set matches production without importing Wire providers or creating cycles.
Centralises pgtestdb provisioning and schema migration so multiple test packages share the same proven setup path.

code_examples.scenario: Multi-domain integration test: unique namespace, create customer with subject, subscribe to a plan
